bids.reasoning: The opponent began with an aggressive opening offer that minimizes my utility (demanding valueC for every issue) and accompanied it with a hostile message. Given that this is the very beginning of the negotiation (t=0.0), I will ignore their cheap talk and counter with my own optimal offer, selecting valueA across all issues. This establishes a strong anchor for my most important issues while giving me plenty of time and room to make gradual concessions later.

The opponent maintains an aggressive stance while offering the absolute minimum utility on all issues, hoping to intimidate me into a large concession.
